extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT Sam won the sprint on Stage 10 with perfect MØRKØV leadout timing at 100m, overtaking SAGAN Peter in green jersey by 21 points.
tactical_patterns: MØRKØV Michael delivered leadout perfectly timed for exactly 100m to go, revealing Deceuninck's precision sprint metric targeting.
Peloton locked breakaway under 2 minutes immediately showing sprinter teams learned not to allow surprise escapes on flat stages.
Teams fought for front position before kilometer 87 right turn onto narrow roads, indicating pre-identified pinch point recon.

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: First Tour stage win combines with green jersey takeover suggests confidence momentum shift versus SAGAN
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: 21-point deficit to BENNETT at this late stage unprecedented for seven-time winner, indicates vulnerability pattern
rider_signals.MØRKØV Michael: positive: 100-meter leadout precision demonstrates elite tactical execution under high-speed sprint chaos
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: neutral: Second place finish without team leadout visible shows raw speed competitive but tactical setup inferior
rider_signals.GREIPEL André: positive: Sixth place represents pleasing return to form suggesting resurgent condition late in career
